steps.title: Find the thesis
steps.content: The final sentence states the main idea: Morales sees both her cultural-icon works and ordinary-person works as ways to depict human power and interconnectedness.

steps.title: Choose the broad summary
steps.content: Choice A invents a career progression. Choice C narrows the focus to one work and invents a comparison. Choice D invents scholarly attention. The broad summary that includes famous and everyday examples of strength and connection matches the whole passage. The answer is B.
